diagnose.opportunity_detail: 研究饱和——每个新搜索的边际效用接近零。最有机会的行动=修复持久pattern同步gap(已标记20次)而非发现新领域。

diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 引擎达到研究饱和——数据积累(13+领域)超过实际应用能力。最高价值行动=基础设施修复(决策模式同步)而非更多研究。

queries: multi-agent autonomous coding harness production 2026 best practices verification gates
quantitative trading AI agent automated alpha factor mining 2026 framework open source
key_findings: Harness Engineering 2026: Agent = Model + Harness paradigm. 5-layer production harness (Tool Orchestration → Verification → Context/Memory → Guardrails → Observability). Critical insight: Generator ≠ Validator — same system that produces code must not validate it. Open-source: loop-harness (worktree+2nd-agent gate), reins (disjoint roles+blocking CI), metaswarm (18 agents+adversarial review). 'Harness Engineering for AI Coding Agents' book (Calado May 2026).

RD-Agent (Microsoft, MIT): first data-centric multi-agent quant R&D. 2x returns with 70% fewer factors. EasyQuant (MCP+Claude, WorldQuant BRAIN Fitness 1.26). Robin (session-native audit trails + DL factors). FactorMiner (self-evolving+experience memory). AlphaBench (ICLR 2026, first FAFM benchmark). NVIDIA NeMo 3-agent pipeline. alpha-skills (113 skills for Claude Code/Gemini CLI).
research.note: Both queries CONFIRMED prior domain research rather than discovering new ground. Harness engineering confirms case-018's multi-agent verifiable gates research. RD-Agent/EasyQuant/Robin confirm case-014/016's factor mining automation + institutional quant research. 2 queries returned 5+ independent sources each. No truly novel domain discovered — engine has reached research saturation.

decide.decision_summary: L3第20轮(06-17T09:00Z): 30h无用户交互。修复持久decision-patterns同步gap(20次L3后终处理, 8→18模式)。档案追加Case 23(case-001)。2搜索确认研究领域(无新发现——饱和确认)。OBSERVE——用户无信号, 引擎静默维护。

RD-Agent/EasyQuant confirm prior factor mining automation (domain 5/13/14/16). Engine has reached research saturation at 13+ unique domains — this is the first L3 cycle returning zero novel domain discovery. Time to reduce WebSearch budget from 2 to 0-1 per activation until new user interaction triggers fresh direction.
execute.delta_detail: Workspace in steady state since 06-17T00:00Z. No new user commits. WIP changes persistent but unchanged from prior cycles. No infrastructure-level concerns.

execute.infrastructure_note: Research saturation confirmed at L3 cycle 20. Recommend reducing WebSearch budget to 0-1 queries per activation until: (a) new user interaction provides fresh direction, (b) one of the 13+ domains becomes actionable via user goal setting.

retrospect.new_pattern_discovered: scout:research_saturation — 当引擎检测到连续N次L3均无法发现新研究领域时, 进入研究饱和模式: 缩减搜索预算至0-1查询, 优先内部基础设施维护
lessons_learned: 研究饱和是真实状态——13+独特领域后每新搜索的边际效用接近零
20-cycle持久缺陷的修复成本极低(5分钟)——延迟这么久的根本原因是被标记为'低优先级'而非真正困难
Harness Engineering (Generator≠Validator) 是autonomous-engine治理的下一个进化方向
RD-Agent(2x returns, 70% fewer factors)是moni因子管线的新参考基线
引擎在无用户交互下的价值产出持续递减——考虑设置更激进的沉默阈值
